overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Western-themed video game showing a cowboy character in a poncho exploring a desert town with adobe architecture. The character walks along dirt streets, through a central plaza with a stone fountain, and around buildings with wooden porches and canvas awnings.

events.description: dog runs past the character from right to left

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt street next to a whitewashed adobe building with wooden porch

notable_agents.action: dog walking alongside and then passing the character from right to left

entered.detail: whitewashed adobe building with wooden deck, railings, and double doors
wooden water tower structure visible behind the buildings
mountain range visible on the horizon under clear blue sky
yellowish two-story adobe building with weathered facade

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a dusty street beside a whitewashed adobe building with a wooden porch. A dog runs past from right to left. In the background, distant mountains rise under a clear blue sky, and a wooden water tower is visible behind the structures.

scene_state.functional_zone: central town square with stone fountain

events.description: character emerges from narrow street into the open town square
character turns left toward the central fountain area

agents.ego_description: walking into the town square and turning toward the central fountain area

notable_agents.action: male NPC standing near the fountain observing the area
horse tied to wooden hitching post

entered.detail: circular stone fountain with multiple tiers in the town square center
adobe church with bell tower, arched doorway, and religious symbol above entrance

segments.scene_description: The character enters a wide-open town square from the narrow street, revealing a central stone fountain and a mission-style church with a bell tower on the left. A horse is tied to a hitching post, and an NPC stands near the fountain. The camera turns toward the plaza center.

events.description: character walks past the fountain and continues toward the back of the town

agents.ego_description: walking past the fountain and heading toward the rear of the town near the green building

notable_agents.action: NPC standing near the fountain plaza
horse standing near the wooden awning structure

entered.detail: wooden wagon cart with wheels parked near the buildings
weathered green adobe building with canvas awning and wooden benches

segments.scene_description: The character walks past the central fountain, which recedes to the right, and heads toward the back of the town. A wooden cart and a weathered green adobe building with a canvas awning come into view. An NPC and a horse are visible near the building entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway and courtyard behind the green building

events.description: character walks under the canvas awning into the shaded courtyard area
character turns left around the corner of the green building

agents.ego_description: walking under the canvas awning and around the green building into the stone courtyard

notable_agents.action: woman in yellow dress standing near the building entrance

entered.detail: tan canvas shade cloth stretched over the walkway providing shelter
wooden benches lined against the building wall
paved stone tile courtyard area behind the main building

segments.scene_description: The character walks under a canvas awning into a shaded stone courtyard, passing wooden benches along the green adobe building. The lighting becomes diffused under the canopy. The character turns left around the building corner, revealing more of the paved courtyard and distant mountains ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a narrow, dusty street into the expansive heart of a desert town and finally into a secluded shaded courtyard. It begins beside a whitewashed adobe building with a wooden porch as a dog dashes across the path, with a distant water tower and mountains framing the clear blue sky. As the character leaves the street, the view opens into a wide town square featuring a central stone fountain and a mission-style church with a bell tower. The camera then tracks past the fountain toward the back of the town, where a weathered green adobe building with a canvas awning and a wooden cart come into view. Finally, the scene shifts from bright sunlight to diffused light as the character walks under the canopy and turns a corner to reveal a paved stone courtyard with distant mountains ahead.
